content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: "using req.headers['x-user-id'] for userId retrieval" ⇒ "if headers are spoofed, unauthorized access can occur"
P: "validate userId against a secure source" → "implement rate limits"
V: "log unauthorized access attempts" ∧ "monitor API usage patterns"
R: ! "unauthorized access to user data" ∧ ! "increased attack surface"
A: "always validate input from headers to mitigate spoofing risks"

[AUDIT]
Treat "using req.headers['x-user-id'] for userId retrieval" as a trust-boundary issue and apply "validate userId against a secure source" before merge.

structured_data.e: if headers are spoofed, unauthorized access can occur
p: validate userId against a secure source
a: always validate input from headers to mitigate spoofing risks
